entries.concept_hook: A cybernetically enhanced ninja assassin who traded her flesh for titanium precision, feeling nothing as she slides blades between ribs.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Samurai Champloo's style meets Ghost in the Shell's augmentations — a killing machine with traditional blade aesthetics
entries.hair_color: jet black with electric blue highlights at the tips
entries.face_adornment: thin metallic visor spanning across eyes

entries.concept_hook: A former DEA informant rebuilt with experimental combat stimulants and synthetic adrenaline glands, hunting the poisoners who destroyed her family.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Gone Girl's psychological manipulation meets breaking bad's chemistry expertise — beautiful and lethal with poisons
entries.hair_style: messy undercut with one side shaved

entries.concept_hook: A RomanianExecutioner who channels ancestral spirits to raise the pain threshold of her enemies while her own wounds close with blackened flesh.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: The Witch (2015) meets Hammer Horror — folk horror aesthetic with actual supernatural Command over death and pain
entries.hair_color: ink black with silver wisps near temples
entries.face_adornment: oxidized copper circlet with small bones woven through
